summary: Float value 1.5 — exactly representable as IEEE-754 f16. Under R6 (forward-compatibility), a conformant emitter MUST emit the 2-byte f16 form (major type 7, additional info 25). The Rust oracle today does not implement R6 and passes the value through to ciborium, which emits 8-byte f64. This case is marked forward_compatibility=true; the Rust adapter returns result=unimplemented.
notes: R6 expected output for a conformant runtime: f9 3e00 (f16 1.5). Rust oracle today emits fb 3ff8000000000000 (f64). Because R6 is documented as inert in the profile (§2 R6 Status), no expected_output_hex is claimed here; the adapter reports result=unimplemented. A future regeneration after R6 lands in integrity-cbor will populate expected_output_hex with f93e00.
